name: Headphones - Cinema
description: Maximalist stereo cinema preset for headphones — pushes Bauer crossfeed and bass-aware widening to the edge so films and orchestral mixes feel like a virtual room rather than two speakers strapped to your skull. Auto-match disabled: pick this manually when you want the cinematic mode. (Full HRTF/binaural 7.1 convolution will arrive in a later release.)
